mnemonics: CRISP-DM Phases: CC-DM-EV (Crispy DM, Every Victory) - 1.Conceptualize (Business Understanding), 2.Clean (Data Understanding), 3.Design (Data Preparation), 4.Model (Modeling), 5.Evaluate (Evaluation), 6.Validate (Deployment)
keyPoints: Ensure your analysis follows a structured process like CRISP-DM
Validate model assumptions (e.g., normality, homoscedasticity) before interpreting results
Thoroughly document your code and decision-making process for reproducibility
commonMistakes: Using models without checking for multicollinearity among predictor variables
Overfitting models to training data without using techniques like cross-validation
Misinterpreting correlation as causation in analytical findings
